title: Circuit Matrix Representation of a Graph
description: A visual representation of a simple connected graph with two fundamental circuits, showing the corresponding circuit matrix B.
elements: Graph G with 4 vertices (v1, v2, v3, v4) and 5 edges (e1, e2, e3, e4, e5)
Spanning Tree T (edges e1, e2, e3)
relationships: The spanning tree T defines the fundamental circuits
Each row in matrix B corresponds to a fundamental circuit
Each column in matrix B corresponds to an edge in graph G
Matrix entries are +1, -1, or 0 indicating edge direction relative to circuit orientation
